chief_complaint: A 55-year-old woman presented with hemoptysis two months post-elective cervical discectomy.
history: Glanzmann Thrombasthenia (GT) is a congenital platelet disorder with a life-long bleeding tendency. The patient underwent elective cervical discectomy with a perioperative hemostatic regimen including recombinant Factor VIIa, platelet transfusions, and tranexamic acid.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: CT pulmonary angiography confirmed bilateral segmental and subsegmental PE with pulmonary infarctions. ECG and other blood tests are not mentioned.
